heading: National School Lunch Week
label: 132 National School Lunch Week

children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: The week beginning on the second Sunday in October is National School Lunch Week.

children.heading: .—Proclamation
children.label: b .—Proclamation
children.text: The President is requested to issue each year a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to observe National School Lunch Week with appropriate ceremonies and activities.
